Interface NamedProgramElement

All Superinterfaces:
ModelElement, NamedModelElement, NonTerminalProgramElement, ProgramElement, SourceElement
All Known Subinterfaces:
NameReference, TypeReferenceInfix
All Known Implementing Classes:

public interface NamedProgramElement extends NamedModelElement, NonTerminalProgramElement
Named program element.
